name: Novu API
description: Novu REST API. Please see https://docs.novu.co/api-reference for more details.

capabilities.name: environments
capabilities.description: Manage environments — create an environment, update an environment, list all environments. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: events
capabilities.description: Manage events — trigger event, bulk trigger event, broadcast event to all. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: notifications
capabilities.description: Manage notifications — list all events, retrieve an event. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: integrations
capabilities.description: Manage integrations — create an integration, generate chat oauth url, auto-configure an integration for inbound webhooks. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: contexts
capabilities.description: Manage contexts — create a context, list all contexts, retrieve a context. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: subscribers
capabilities.description: Manage subscribers — bulk create subscribers, create a subscriber, update notifications state. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: layouts
capabilities.description: Manage layouts — create a layout, duplicate a layout, generate layout preview. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: messages
capabilities.description: Manage messages — list all messages, delete a message, delete messages by transactionid. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: topics
capabilities.description: Manage topics — create a topic, create topic subscriptions, list all topics. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: workflows
capabilities.description: Manage workflows — create a workflow, sync a workflow, update a workflow. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: channel_connections
capabilities.description: Manage channel connections — create a channel connection, list all channel connections, retrieve a channel connection. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: channel_endpoints
capabilities.description: Manage channel endpoints — create a channel endpoint, list all channel endpoints, retrieve a channel endpoint. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
